note: Catalog of public datasets released by papers in the field guide. `paper_keys` cross-reference papers/papers.json. Status lifecycle: pending -> downloaded; or gated / request / too_large / unavailable / failed. Datasets land in data/<key>/.

datasets.name: New Yorker Caption Contest corpus
datasets.contents: Cartoons + finalist captions; matching/ranking/explanation tasks
datasets.approx_size: 7.9 GB (148,945 rows incl. cartoon images, all task configs)
datasets.note: Not vendored (7.9 GB, images embedded across configs). Fetch on demand via HF `datasets` with a specific config, or flip status to pending + allow_large. Companion code: github.com/jmhessel/caption_contest_corpus.

datasets.name: HumorBench
datasets.contents: ~300 expert-annotated cartoon-caption pairs with joke-element rubrics + grading code
datasets.note: Text-only (cartoon descriptions); NYCC images live in the caption-contest datasets. NB: 2.1GB of the clone is the authors' analysis/ artifacts — the benchmark itself is comprehensive_annotations.csv (240KB).

datasets.name: PunEval + PunnyPattern + PunBreak + NAP
datasets.contents: 2,589 cleaned SemEval-2017 puns + perturbed variants for the illusion-of-understanding probes
datasets.note: JOKER subset intentionally not released by its authors. Underlying pun text CC BY-NC via SemEval-2017.

datasets.name: Comparing Apples to Oranges jokes
datasets.contents: 600 jokes across 4 types (hom/het puns, non-topical, topical) with human explanations

datasets.name: ExPUNations (ExPun)
datasets.contents: 1,899 puns with keywords, natural-language explanations, funniness ratings

datasets.name: Phunny
datasets.contents: 350 novel human-written structured puns (+contamination controls) for generalization testing

datasets.name: SemEval-2017 Task 7 puns
datasets.contents: ~2,396 English puns (homographic + heterographic); detection/location/interpretation; gold + scorer
datasets.note: The root corpus behind most pun work (ExPun, PunEval, etc.). Archive extracted in place.

datasets.name: ChinesePun
datasets.contents: ~2.1k annotated Chinese puns (PGCL curriculum-learning paper)

datasets.name: Oogiri-GO
datasets.contents: 130k+ multimodal/multilingual Oogiri game samples (EN/ZH/JA), ~78% with preference stars

datasets.name: SemEval-2026 Task 1 MWAHAHA data
datasets.contents: Humor-generation shared-task inputs (constraint prompts + GIFs); no labeled training data by design
datasets.note: Official task-overview supplement: evaluation data, prompts, and leaderboard resources. Task site and additional baselines: github.com/pln-fing-udelar/semeval-2026-humor-gen.

datasets.name: MULAI
datasets.contents: 2h14 of annotated dyadic interaction with 601 laughs, 168 speech-laughs, respiration events, participant humor ratings, personality, and physiological measures
datasets.license: Individual license required; terms supplied by the authors
datasets.note: The paper directs researchers to contact the authors; questionnaire, video, audio, and physiological data require an individual license. No stable public distribution page was located as of 2026-07-13.

datasets.name: CHEESE!
datasets.contents: Eleven French face-to-face dyadic conversations; five had speech/transcription enrichment and two had manual smile, humor-sequence, and recipient-reaction annotations at publication
datasets.note: ORTOLANG hosts the corpus. At publication, five interactions had speech/transcription enrichment, while only two had manual smile and humor annotations. The paper reports reduced audio/video available without registration and the full corpus on demand after registration; redistribution terms were not stated clearly enough to vendor it automatically.

datasets.name: SMILE-Next
datasets.contents: Question-answer data for laughter detection, polite/satirical/mirthful type classification, and laughter reasoning from textualized multimodal video cues
datasets.note: Code and model implementation: https://github.com/kaist-ami/SMILE-Next. The public dataset contains textualized multimodal cues and QA pairs, not redistributed source videos.

datasets.name: MaMe-Re
datasets.contents: 250 synthetic social posts × 400 openly licensed manga panels: 100,000 context-reply pairs with five binary funniness annotations each
datasets.note: The paper's dataset footnote still points to `https://will.be.published.soon`; no stable repository or archive was located as of 2026-07-13. Source manga are free-use with attribution, but benchmark release terms are not yet published.

datasets.name: New Yorker caption ranking (Humor in AI)
datasets.contents: 2.18M captions with 250M+ aggregated crowd votes across ~900 contests + cartoon images + GPT-4 descriptions
datasets.note: Code: github.com/yguooo/cartoon-caption-generation. Rolling raw per-contest data: github.com/nextml/caption-contest-data.

datasets.name: HumorDB
datasets.contents: 3,545 images (funny/not, incl. minimally-contrastive edited pairs); binary + 1-10 regression + pairwise tasks

datasets.name: YesBut-Satire (Nandy et al.)
datasets.contents: 2,547 two-panel contradiction/satire comics (1,084 satirical) with annotations
datasets.note: Canonical repo github.com/abhi1nandy2/yesbut_dataset (annotations + Drive links). No explicit license.

datasets.name: YesBut-Juxtaposition (Hu et al.)
datasets.contents: 348 two-panel comics with descriptions, contradiction explanations, philosophies, titles, distractors, and source URLs
datasets.approx_size: small (348 annotation rows; images referenced by URL)
datasets.note: Official NeurIPS 2024 Hu et al. benchmark; distinct from Nandy et al.'s EMNLP satire dataset.

datasets.name: YesBut V2-Juxtaposition (Hu et al.)
datasets.contents: 1,262 multilingual/multicultural satire comic images
datasets.note: Follow-up to Hu et al.'s 348-item YesBut-Juxtaposition benchmark, not to Nandy et al.'s YesBut-Satire dataset.

datasets.name: Turing Jest stimuli and responses
datasets.contents: One-line joke, non-joke, and surprising non-joke stimuli plus human and LLM detection, appreciation, and comprehension data and analysis code
datasets.note: Official reproducibility repository; no repository-level license detected.

datasets.name: MultiPun
datasets.contents: 445 multimodal puns and 890 adversarial non-pun distractors for detection, localization, and explanation
datasets.approx_size: small repository; image archive hosted separately on Google Drive
datasets.note: Official repository links the image dataset on Google Drive; the git checkout contains release metadata rather than the image archive.

datasets.name: Corpus-pragmatics humor annotations
datasets.contents: Annotations of 200 Italian political tweets for humor presence and 90 humorous tweets for five communicative functions, with human/LLM labels, prompts, codebooks, and R analysis
datasets.note: Official OSF release (doi:10.17605/OSF.IO/WPCR6).

datasets.name: PixelHumor
datasets.contents: Annotations + URLs for 2,800 multi-panel comics from 7 creators (images NOT included)
datasets.note: Comic images must be fetched from original creators' sites (copyright stays with them; research use only; expect link rot).

datasets.name: MemeReaCon
datasets.contents: 1,565 meme instances with post + community reaction context
datasets.note: No public release found as of July 2026 (Reddit-sourced; likely restricted). Contact authors via EMNLP 2025 paper.

datasets.name: ExFunTube
datasets.contents: 10,136 funny YouTube videos: URLs + funny-moment timestamps + explanations (videos not distributed)
datasets.note: Saved as exfuntube.json. Videos must be fetched from YouTube; expect link rot since 2023. Code: github.com/dayoon-ko/ExFunTube.

datasets.name: v-HUB
datasets.contents: 951 minimally-verbal video clips (silent films + UGC) with captions/explanations/QA
datasets.note: Slightly over the default size cap; included deliberately (video is the point). Mixed copyright status on silent-film clips; research use.

datasets.name: OxfordTVG-HIC
datasets.contents: ~2.9M humorous image-caption pairs with humor scores
datasets.approx_size: tens of GB (images via Google Drive)
datasets.note: Cross-referenced training set for HUMORCHAIN. Repo is code + gdown scripts; data via Google Drive folder (quota-throttled). Not vendored.

datasets.name: Cards Against LLMs (code)
datasets.contents: Evaluation code for 9,894 Cards Against Humanity rounds; the rounds data itself is proprietary
datasets.note: CAH Lab Gameplay Dataset available on request to mail@cardsagainsthumanity.com; scripts expect two CSVs in cah_lab_v2_data_for_research_2025_06/. Cloning code repo only.

datasets.name: Expanded Oogiri eval set (Sakabe et al.)
datasets.contents: Multi-dimensional Oogiri generation/evaluation annotations (Novelty/Clarity/Relevance/Intelligence/Empathy)
datasets.note: Paper footnote points to github.com/SDS-NLP/Oogiri-Eval which 404s as of July 2026. Watch the SDS-NLP org or email authors (Tokyo Metropolitan Univ.).

datasets.name: Oogiri-Master dataset builder
datasets.contents: Reproducible builder (rate-limited crawler) for Oogiri-Master (600 tasks) + Oogiri-Corpus (82,536 pairs); no data dump
datasets.license: MIT (builder); dataset CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 when rebuilt
datasets.note: Deliberately does not redistribute the data — run the crawler to rebuild locally.

datasets.name: StandUp4AI
datasets.contents: Metadata, laughter-annotation CSVs, and scripts for 3,617 stand-up videos in 7 languages (videos are YouTube links)
datasets.approx_size: small repo (~330KB); underlying video ~334h not included
datasets.note: Research-purposes-only per README; some full data available on demand from authors.

datasets.name: Workplace humor appropriateness (Not All Jokes Land)
datasets.contents: 304 industry-specific humorous statements annotated for appropriateness
datasets.note: Paper's anonymous.4open.science repo expired (verified July 2026); no deanonymized release found. Email authors.

datasets.name: Harm or Humor benchmark
datasets.contents: 3,000 texts + 6,000 images + 1,200 videos for overt/covert harmful-humor detection
datasets.note: Google Drive folder (Images/Text/Videos), accessible without login but fragile — fetch manually with gdown --folder if needed. No GitHub/HF release.

datasets.name: Chumor 2.0
datasets.contents: Culturally-specific Chinese jokes from Ruo Zhi Ba with human explanations (supersedes 1.0)
datasets.note: Gated by click-through agreement (no reposting examples online). Accept on HF + `hf auth login`, then flip status to pending and rerun.

datasets.name: CFunSet
datasets.contents: ~164K Chinese humor instruction rows aggregating 7 sources (Tieba JokeBar, CrossDial, Chumor, ...)

datasets.name: Pun2Pun
datasets.contents: 5.5k textual puns + ~1k visual pun images for Chinese-English pun translation
datasets.note: No license file; redistribution rights unclear.

datasets.name: Getting Serious with LLMs (unfun pairs)
datasets.contents: Human unfun data + English-Hindi tweet humor + LLM unfunning code (ACL 2024)

datasets.name: Unfun.me database dumps
datasets.contents: ~11K human-unfunned satirical headlines (v1-v3 dumps from the unfun.me game)
datasets.note: The upstream source the ACL 2024 paper builds on (v3, Feb 2023).

datasets.name: HaHackathon (SemEval-2021 Task 7)
datasets.contents: 10k texts jointly rated for humor and offense (train/dev/test CSVs)
datasets.note: Participant-team mirror (UMUTeam); official CodaLab competition is archived. CSVs verified present in datasets/ folder.

datasets.name: Humicroedit + FunLines (SemEval-2020 Task 7)
datasets.contents: ~15K minimally-edited news headlines with funniness grades + 8,248 FunLines headlines
datasets.note: Official organizer page (Hossain). Also mirrored on Zenodo (record 3969509). Zips extracted in place.

datasets.name: rJokes corpus
datasets.contents: 550K+ Reddit jokes with upvote-derived humor degrees (through Jan 2020)
datasets.license: Subject to Reddit License/ToS per README
datasets.note: README requires removing posts on OP request.

datasets.name: UR-FUNNY (repo)
datasets.contents: Docs + loaders for multimodal TED-talk humor detection; actual features/videos via Dropbox links
datasets.approx_size: repo small; features ~3.75 GB, raw videos ~19 GB (Dropbox, not vendored)
datasets.note: Cloning repo only. Feature pickles / video zip links are in the README if needed later.

datasets.name: UNPIE (Understanding Pun with Image Explanations)
datasets.contents: 1,000 puns, each paired with an image explaining both meanings; grounding, disambiguation, and reconstruction tasks
datasets.note: Official EMNLP artifact; images may retain source-specific rights.

datasets.name: Cockamamie Gobbledegook single-word humor data
datasets.contents: Single-word humor ratings, individual preferences, demographic clusters, and theory-motivated feature annotations
datasets.note: Official ICML code/data repository.

datasets.name: Jester joke ratings
datasets.contents: 6.5M anonymous -10 to +10 ratings across successive releases over a small set of 100 to 158 jokes
datasets.note: Foundational preference data, but the joke inventory is small and culturally dated. The official site requests a courtesy email when the data is used.
datasets.note_auto: Official Berkeley download host was unreachable from the pipeline on 2026-07-11; retry later.

datasets.name: Qwen3 humor parameter ablation data
datasets.contents: 50 humor themes, model generations, human rankings, automated-judge results, and analysis code

datasets.name: One Million Reddit Jokes
datasets.contents: One-million-joke reference corpus used for corpus novelty and topic-handle originality measures
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 per dataset card; underlying Reddit content remains subject to platform/user rights

datasets.name: Open Mic humor quotient dataset
datasets.contents: ~40 hours of English stand-up clips/transcripts with five-level laughter-derived humor quotient labels
datasets.license: CC BY-SA 4.0 for repository; source-media rights may differ
datasets.approx_size: small code repository; media archive linked externally
datasets.note: The repository links the media archive at cfilt.iitb.ac.in; that server currently rejects automated HEAD requests, so the pipeline vendors the code/metadata repository only.

datasets.name: TIC-TALK
datasets.contents: 5,416 aligned topic segments across 90 filmed stand-up specials: text, laughter, shot type, pose, and kinematic features
datasets.note: Processing code: github.com/yaelle-z/TIC-TALK. Source Netflix specials are not redistributed.

datasets.name: Counterfactual humor fairness data
datasets.contents: Identity-agnostic and identity-specific joke subsets plus 61,600 speaker-target-conditioned generation/refusal outputs
datasets.note: Official preprint repository; downstream Humor Recognition and HaHackathon source terms also apply.

datasets.name: D-HUMOR
datasets.contents: 4,379 Reddit memes labeled for dark humor, target category, and three-level intensity
datasets.note: Submit the access form linked from the official repository. Sensitive/offensive content; redistribution is explicitly prohibited.

datasets.name: HinS Hindi long-context humor benchmark
datasets.contents: 1,046 Hindi sitcom, film, and stand-up clips represented by dialogue plus textual visual/audio cues; 676 clips are CC-licensed
datasets.note: The proceedings paper still points to an anonymized OSF view-only URL; wait for a stable deanonymized release before vendoring.

datasets.name: CLEF 2024 JOKER track data
datasets.contents: Humor-aware retrieval, humor genre/technique classification, and English-to-French pun translation resources
datasets.note: No stable public download archive was linked from the 2024 task page or overview as of 2026-07-11; data was distributed to registered participants.
